form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 50-day let-up. First-up after two months 7th of 14 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind Grand Chelem carrying 58kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 2nd of 11 at Deauville All Weather on October 23 over 1900m, 3 len behind Quiet King carrying 58kg at $46. Looks hard to beat in this line up.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 3rd of 14 at Argentan on April 9 2025 over 2500m, slow going 2 len behind Nubuck carrying 56kg at $18. Makes appeal.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start 6th of 9 at this track on March 13 over 2600m, slow going 12 len behind Highara with 58kg at $4.10. The run before that came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Chantilly All Weather on February 13 over 2700m, 0.8 len behind Un Jour Pour Moi carrying 57kg at $4. Key runner on his best efforts.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd of 13 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 24 over 2400m, nose behind Los Suenos carrying 58kg at $15. Last start ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 11 over 2400m, 5 len behind Erling with 58kg at $4.90. Shapes as one to consider.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months second last of 14 at Senonnes-Pouanc? on April 8 over 2100m, 17 len behind Viento De Levante with 58kg at $85. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Auteuil November 15 over 3600m. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 12 at this track on March 29 over 3550m, on a slow track; 26 len behind Stecaster with 66kg at $20. The start before that 8th of 10 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 9 over 2400m, on rain affected going; 32 len behind Louis Othon with 53.5kg at $16. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation eighth of 13 at Argentan April 9 2025 over 2500m, soft track; 6 len behind And We Danced carrying 55kg at $5.60. When resuming last campaign 11th of 16 at Longchamp September 5 2024 over 2500m, soft track; 13 len behind Resplendor with 55.5kg at $137. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: Resuming after six months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign second last of 13 at Argentan October 8 over 2900m, soft track; 18 len behind Exchange Square carrying 55kg at $13. When resuming last campaign ninth of 14 at Saint-Cloud September 12 over 3100m, soft track; 22 len behind Kando carrying 56.5kg at $39. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Sea The Stars out of Balladeuse on debut. By leading sire Sea The Stars so may be worth following later on.
